misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, a celebrated figure from St. Laurence Golf, brings a wealth of experience to the greens of the Hector Trophée. With a relaxed demeanor that belies his competitive spirit, Martin is rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand, a testament to his philosophy of enjoying the game to its fullest.

Having graced the tournament with his presence on 10 prior occasions, Martin's familiarity with the nuances of the event is undeniable. His dedication and skill have not gone unrewarded, as he has clinched the coveted Hector Trophée once, a testament to his ability to perform under pressure and forge strong partnerships.

Adding to his accolades, Martin has also claimed the Victor Trophy, underscoring his prowess as an individual player. As he prepares for his 11st appearance at Hector Trophée 2026, anticipation is high to see how Martin's experience and relaxed approach will translate on the course.
